public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(telephoneNumber={0})", new Object[]{extension}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) throws NamingException { if (extension == null || !extension.matches("[0-9]{2,8}")) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid extension"); return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(telephoneNumber={0})", new Object[]{extension}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) throws NamingException { String validatedExtension = java.util.Objects.requireNonNull(extension); if (!validatedExtension.matches("[0-9]+")) throw new IllegalArgumentException(); return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(telephoneNumber={0})", new Object[]{validatedExtension}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", "(telephoneNumber=" + extension + ")", new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) throws NamingException { String filter = "(&(telephoneNumber=" + extension + ")(objectClass=person))"; return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", filter, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { String query = "(st=" + region + ")"; return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", query, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(st={0})", new Object[]{region}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { java.util.Set<String> allowed = java.util.Set.of("north", "south", "east", "west"); if (!allowed.contains(region)) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid region"); return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(st={0})", new Object[]{region}, new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("ou=people,dc=example,dc=com", "(&(objectClass=person)(st={0}))", new Object[]{region}, new SearchControls()); }
public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", "(st=" + region + ")", new SearchControls()); }

public NamingEnumeration<SearchResult> retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) throws NamingException { String filter = "(|(st=" + region + ")(l=" + region + "))"; return ctx.search("dc=example,dc=com", filter, new SearchControls()); }
